pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and export_result.sh logic explicitly tracking and confirming erroneous entries > 150kg are removed
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh SQL queries using 150 as the threshold distinguishing correct vs erroneous entries
setup_task.sh script injecting the entries into the admin user account via Django ORM User.objects.get(username='admin')

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for wger_env delete_weight_entries task by confirming that the prerequisite 30 valid weight entries and 3 erroneous weight entries (>150kg) are synthetically generated and explicitly injected into the admin account via Django ORM in setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected target erroneous count of 0, maximum valid weight threshold of 150, and admin username directly match the task description instructions and setup scripts. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, rendering the task unscorable.
